info.name: Diet Plan API Collection
info.description: Complete Diet Plan API endpoints for testing

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Updated Weight Loss Plan",
  "description": "Updated 7-day weight loss diet plan",
  "startDate": "2024-04-01",
  "endDate": "2024-04-07",
  "weeklyPlan": [...]
}

{
  "planId": "{{planId}}",
  "date": "2024-03-30",
  "dayName": "Monday",
  "mealType": "breakfast",
  "foodIndex": 0,
  "food": {
    "name": "Greek Yogurt with Berries",
    "calories": 250,
    "protein": 20,
    "carbs": 30,
    "fat": 8,
    "image": "https://example.com/yogurt.jpg",
    "recipe": "Mix Greek yogurt with fresh berries and honey"
  }
}
